org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class Composition

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.Composition

  • public class Composition
extends java.lang.Object
    A ERSAP composition of services. The orchestrator should send a request to the first service of the composition, and the output of each service will be sent to the next service in the composition, until all are executed.

    The result of each service can be compared against given states to provide custom routing logic.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Composition(java.lang.String composition)
      Parses a composition from the given string.

      • Composition

        public Composition(java.lang.String composition)

    • Method Detail

      • firstService

        public java.lang.String firstService()
        Gets the first service of this composition. This is the service that starts the composition.
        Returns:
        the canonical name of the first service
